title: LBA Modifications: Quick Start & Modding Tools [updated: 01-04-2009]
label: mixed
first_post_preview: [b]What are mods?[/b] Mods are modifications to the game's resources. Resources include scenes, models, animations, videos, etc. but also smaller things such as texts and fonts.
